ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., East/Southeast Asia, South Asia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region (population per square kilometer) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which population data is available */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data for the year (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for the region and year */,
  "population_percentage" TEXT /* Population percentage for the region and year */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in rural areas */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the population data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population projection entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "projected_population_count" INTEGER /* Projected population count for the region and year */,
  "projected_population_percentage" TEXT /* Projected population percentage for the region and year */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Projected age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Projected gender distribution of the population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Projected number of people living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Projected number of people living in rural areas */,
  "projection_method" TEXT /* Method used for the projection */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the projection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the projection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
